spec.description: Dashboard showing Prometheus Alertmanager metrics for observing status of the cluster and possible debbuging.

spec.title: Notification durations per integration on $instance
spec.description: Duration of notification sends in 0.99 and 0.9 quantiles per integration.

spec.title: Notifications sent from $instance
spec.description: Number of sent notifications to distinct integrations such as PagerDuty, Slack and so on. On negative axis are displayed failed notifications.

spec.title: Cluster size
spec.description: Number of peers in the Alertmanager cluster.

spec.title: Instance versions and up time
spec.description: Table containing list of Alertmanager instances showing it's version, up time, last reload time and if it was successful.

spec.title: Number of  propagated gossip messages on $instance
Duration of oversized gossip messages on $instance
Count of oversized gossip messages on $instance
Cluster members count on $instance
spec.description: Shows gossip cluster members count in time and failing peers in case of any in red color.

spec.title: Cluster messages count on $instance
spec.description: On positive axis is number of sent cluster messages by type `update`  or `full_state` and on negative axis the same for received messages.

spec.title: Cluster messages size on $instance
spec.description: On positive axis is size of sent cluster messages by type `update`  or `full_state` and on negative axis the same for received messages.

spec.title: Clusterhealth score for $instance
spec.description:
Shows cluster score representing cluster health. From Hashicorps official documentation: 
> This metric describes a node's perception of its own health based on how well it is meeting the soft real-time requirements of the protocol. This metric ranges from 0 to 8, where 0 indicates "totally healthy".

For more info see https://www.consul.io/docs/agent/telemetry.html#cluster-health

spec.title: Active alerts in $instance
spec.description: Number of alerts by state such as `active`, `suppressed` etc.

spec.title: Cluster messages queue on $instance
spec.description: On positive axis is number of queued cluster messages and on negative axis number of pruned messages.

spec.title: Cluster reconnections on $instance
spec.description: On positive axis is number of attempts to reconnect the cluster. On negative axis if number of failed attempts.

spec.title: Cluster peers left/joined on $instance
spec.description: On positive axis shows number of peers that joined the cluster and on negative axis number of peers that left the cluster.

spec.title: Received alerts by status for $instance
spec.description: Number of received alerts from Prometheus by status `firing` on positive axis and `resolved` on negative axis.

spec.title: Nf log Go GC time for $instance

links.title: Twitter
links.tooltip: Twitter account with prometheus related info

spec.title: Alertmanager
